  "findings": [
    "Unsealed duct joints lacking approved mastic or foil tape",
    "Use of non-compliant cloth duct tape or complete lack of joint sealant"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Scrape and clean joints of any non-compliant tape or debris",
    "Apply approved duct mastic or UL 181A/B listed foil tape to all joints and seams to meet SMACNA seal class requirements"
  ],
  "rationale": "Commercial ductwork must be sealed in accordance with SMACNA standards and the International Mechanical Code. Cloth duct tape is not an approved sealant and fails to meet the leakage class requirements, leading to energy loss and system inefficiency.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 603.9",
    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "ASHRAE 90.1"
  ]
}
